query:
-- Check how billingPlatform is stored and how many SasBoss services exist
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_sasboss_services
FROM services
WHERE status != 'terminated'
  AND (
    billingPlatform LIKE '%SasBoss%'
    OR billingPlatform LIKE '%sasboss%'
  );

-- Check how many UCXcel Webex Basic services need fixing
SELECT COUNT(*) as webex_basic_to_fix, AVG(monthlyCost) as avg_cost
FROM services
WHERE LOWER(planName) LIKE '%ucxcel webex basic%'
  AND status != 'terminated'
  AND monthlyCost != 0.00;

-- Check all zero-cost pricebook items to understand scope of the problem
SELECT p.product_name, p.partner_buy_price, COUNT(s.id) as service_count, AVG(s.monthlyCost) as avg_service_cost
FROM sasboss_pricebook_items p
JOIN services s ON LOWER(TRIM(s.planName)) = LOWER(TRIM(p.product_name))
WHERE p.version_id = 2
  AND p.partner_buy_price = 0.00
  AND s.status != 'terminated'
  AND s.monthlyCost != 0.00
GROUP BY p.product_name, p.partner_buy_price
ORDER BY service_count DESC;

-- Check how billingPlatform is stored and how many SasBoss services exist
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_sasboss_services
FROM services
WHERE status != 'terminated'
  AND (
    billingPlatform LIKE '%SasBoss%'
    OR billingPlatform LIKE '%sasboss%'
  );

-- Check how many UCXcel Webex Basic services need fixing
SELECT COUNT(*) as webex_basic_to_fix, AVG(monthlyCost) as avg_cost
FROM services
WHERE LOWER(planName) LIKE '%ucxcel webex basic%'
  AND status != 'terminated'
  AND monthlyCost != 0.00;

-- Check all zero-cost pricebook items to understand scope of the problem
SELECT p.product_name, p.partner_buy_price, COUNT(s.id) as service_count, AVG(s.monthlyCost) as avg_service_cost
FROM sasboss_pricebook_items p
JOIN services s ON LOWER(TRIM(s.planName)) = LOWER(TRIM(p.product_name))
WHERE p.version_id = 2
  AND p.partner_buy_price = 0.00
  AND s.status != 'terminated'
  AND s.monthlyCost != 0.00
GROUP BY p.product_name, p.partner_buy_price
ORDER BY service_count DESC;
